description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling, low-profile layout surrounded by a neatly trimmed lawn and several mature trees. The structure features a complex, multi-sectioned roof with both gable and hip elements, and a light gray exterior with darker roofing. A driveway leads up to the main entrance, which is set back from the street and partially obscured by landscaping. The property includes a small, irregularly shaped pool in the backyard, visible from the side and rear views. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing varied natural light. The overall setting suggests a suburban residential environment with ample outdoor space and privacy.
description: A spacious, single-story bungalow with a complex roof, surrounded by trees, a driveway, and a backyard pool. The exterior is light gray with dark roofing and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the driveway, main entrance, and dense tree coverage along the front and side.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the backyard pool, side windows, and more open lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the pool, rear facade, and a clearer view of the roof's complexity.
description_view_3: Direct front view with the driveway leading to the entrance, flanked by trees and a hedge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
